name: b2b-saml-sp-demo
description: SAML SP-initiated SSO demo against Auth0, with custom OAuth 2.0 token exchange after login

scripts.package: rm -rf .build && mkdir -p .build && cp -r server.js lambda.js views public package.json package-lock.json fiscal-psft.pem fiscal-psft_cic-demo-platform_auth0app_com-metadata.xml .build/ && cd .build && npm ci --omit=dev && cd .. && (cd .build && zip -qr ../lambda.zip .) && echo 'Built lambda.zip'
